basic_details.job_title: NISER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER)
basic_details.post_name: Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER) Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.niser.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NISER Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Scientific Administrative Assistant: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline Field Worker: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NISER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NISER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the NISER Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant posts is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NISER?
faq.answer: NISER has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the positions of Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a Graduate Degree in Any Discipline to be eligible for both the Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the NISER recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Field Worker and Scientific Administrative Assistant posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NISER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NISER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for NISER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for NISER Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the designated online portal.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview for the NISER Recruitment 2026 will be conducted via Google Meet on 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NISER?
faq.answer: NISER is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.
